pharma.title: FDA Approves New Combination Therapy for Relapsed or Refractory Multiple Myeloma
pharma.summary: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has approved a new treatment combination of teclistamab‑cqyv with daratumumab and hyaluronidase‑fihj for adult patients with relapsed or refractory Multiple Myeloma. The approval offers a new therapeutic option for...

diagnostics.title: MedGenome acquires majority stake in Medcare Management Services
diagnostics.summary: Founded in 2012, Medcare operates four integrated imaging centres across Mumbai (Chembur), Goregaon, Andheri, and Navi Mumbai offering services such as PET-CT, CT, mammography, nuclear medicine scans, and theragnostics.
diagnostics.thbAction: Use this signal to position THB for diagnostics network expansion, channel partner onboarding, and visibility across spoke sites, franchises, and enterprise accounts.
